title: BEM-911 architecture eventlog
objective:
Run script:
"""
for p in ['governance/architecture','governance/logs','governance/reports','governance/runtime/curator_dispatch','governance/tools']:
    Path(p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

plan_fact_gap = [
  {'area':'Objects GD/DIR/WRK','plan':'objects have defined roles, elements and exchange rules','fact':'objects_registry plus prompts and object_runner exist','gap':'runner is deterministic local/CI runner, not LLM agent runtime yet','status':'partial_real'},
  {'area':'Worker contours','plan':'WRK-C1/C2/C3 execute roadmap in parallel','fact':'inbox/result flow and dispatch queue exist with E2E proof','gap':'consumer is deterministic script; no always-on daemon','status':'partial_real'},
  {'area':'Managed channel','plan':'curator-to-curator exchange','fact':'message envelope, JSONL log and consumer workflow exist','gap':'workflow_dispatch/manual CI runner, not continuous service','status':'partial_real'},
  {'area':'Proof','plan':'PASS requires evidence','fact':'proof files and deterministic tools exist','gap':'commit_sha from codex-status remains null until Git/CI proof policy is enforced','status':'open_gap'},
  {'area':'Pilot','plan':'prepare pilot then gate operator for real target','fact':'pilot scaffold/BMC/onboarding/evaluation/SLA exist','gap':'real segment/client/objective requires operator','status':'correct_gate'}
]
canon = '# ARCHITECTURE_CANON\n\nStatus: active\n\nThis file is the canonical plan/fact/gap view after Claude external audit remediation.\n\n| Area | Plan | Fact | Gap | Status |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n'
for row in plan_fact_gap:
    canon += '| ' + row['area'] + ' | ' + row['plan'] + ' | ' + row['fact'] + ' | ' + row['gap'] + ' | ' + row['status'] + ' |\n'
canon += '\nCurrent interpretation: the repository has moved from pure governance scaffold to a deterministic executable baseline with scripts, workflows and proof files. It is still not a full always-on multi-agent service until CI/Git proof and continuous consumers are enforced.\n'
Path('governance/architecture/ARCHITECTURE_CANON.md').write_text(canon, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/state/architecture_plan_fact_gap.json').write_text(json.dumps({'status':'active','rows':plan_fact_gap}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

# Event log reconstruction summary from available proof markers.
proof_dir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch')
proofs = sorted([str(p) for p in proof_dir.glob('BEM*.md')]) if proof_dir.exists() else []
event_log = Path('governance/logs/event_log.jsonl')
existing_lines = event_log.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if event_log.exists() else []
existing = '\n'.join(existing_lines) + ('\n' if existing_lines else '')
append_events = []
for p in proofs:
    bem = Path(p).name.split('_')[0]
    event_id = 'proof_indexed_' + Path(p).name
    if event_id not in existing:
        append_events.append({'event':event_id,'bem':bem,'proof':p,'status':'indexed_by_BEM911'})
# Avoid huge duplicate blowup; index up to 120 proof files.
for ev in append_events[:120]:
    existing += json.dumps(ev, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n'
event_log.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')

rotation = {
  'status':'active',
  'targets':['governance/logs/event_log.jsonl','governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl','governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl'],
  'rotation_rule':'archive when file exceeds 1 MB or before major release package',
  'archive_path':'governance/logs/archive/<name>_<YYYYMMDD_HHMM>.jsonl',
  'no_schedule_trigger':'rotation is manual/workflow_dispatch only unless operator approves schedule'
}
Path('governance/state/log_rotation_policy.json').write_text(json.dumps(rotation, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

rotation_tool = '''# BEM-911 log rotation checker
import json
from pathlib import Path
policy = json.loads(Path("governance/state/log_rotation_policy.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
for target in policy["targets"]:
    p = Path(target)
    size = p.stat().st_size if p.exists() else 0
    print(f"{target}: {size} bytes")
raise SystemExit(0)
'''
Path('governance/tools/check_log_rotation.py').write_text(rotation_tool, encoding='utf-8')

errors = []
for p in ['governance/architecture/ARCHITECTURE_CANON.md','governance/state/architecture_plan_fact_gap.json','governance/state/log_rotation_policy.json','governance/logs/event_log.jsonl']:
    if not Path(p).exists():
        errors.append('missing ' + p)
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'
Path('governance/reports/BEM911_ARCH_EVENTLOG.md').write_text('# BEM-911 Architecture canon and event log\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nArchitecture canon: governance/architecture/ARCHITECTURE_CANON.md\n\nProofs indexed: ' + str(min(len(append_events),120)) + '\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM911_ARCH_EVENTLOG_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-911 architecture event log proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nProofs indexed: ' + str(min(len(append_events),120)) + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/architecture/ARCHITECTURE_CANON.md','governance/state/architecture_plan_fact_gap.json','governance/logs/event_log.jsonl','governance/state/log_rotation_policy.json','governance/tools/check_log_rotation.py','governance/reports/BEM911_ARCH_EVENTLOG.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM911 architecture eventlog ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
